title: [PUN] PartyUnNoobifier | Hypixel Skyblock
description: Advanced Party Finder mod for Hypixel Skyblock - Auto-kick players, manage blacklist, and filter party finder entries with rich commands and GUI.
body:
# 🛡️ PUN - PartyUnNoobifier
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/pun?logo=modrinth&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hypixel-dailyrewards#download) [![Modrinth Game Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/game%20versions-1.21.10%20%7C%201.21.11-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hypixel-dailyrewards/#download) [![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/pun?logo=modrinth&label=Mod%20version&style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hypixel-dailyrewards/versions) [![Discord Issues](https://img.shields.io/discord/1449803485901230193?style=for-the-badge&color=6a79ff&logo=discord&label=Report%20Issue)](https://discord.gg/invite/Y6ADqB3zGv) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-ARR-blue?style=for-the-badge&color=ff0000&logo=github)](https://github.com/Cqseur/DailyRewards/blob/main/LICENSE) **Automatically protect your party from unwanted players on Hypixel SkyBlock**
> No more randoms ruining your runs! PUN automatically kicks players who don't meet your requirements. --- ## ✨ Features ### 🚫 Smart Auto-Kick - **Custom Blacklist** - Kick blacklisted players with custom reasons - **Class Filters** - Block Archer, Berserker, Mage, Tank or Healer - **Stats Filter** - Automatically kick anyone not matching Stats requirements - **Customizable Messages** - Personalize all kick messages ### ### 📊 Stats Filters #### ⚔️ Dungeons - **Minimum Secrets** - Require a minimum secret count - Configurable thresholds: 0, 1k, 2k, 5k, 7.5k, 10k, 20k - **Minimum Secrets Per Run** - Self Explanatory - Configurable thresholds: 0, 3, 5, 7.5, 10, 12, 14 #### 🏹 Kuudra - **Runs per Tier** - Require runs on T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 or Total - Configurable thresholds: 0, 100, 200, 300, 500, 750, 1000+ ### 🪖 Equipment Filters (Removed, lack of knowledge of the current meta) - **Archer** → Require Terminator - **Mage** → Require Hyperion/Astraea/Scylla/Valkyrie - **Berserker** → Require Giant's Sword/Dark Claymore ### 👥 Bypass System - **Friend Bypass** - Your friends skip all checks - **Guild Bypass** - Guild members are exempted --- ## 🎮 Commands | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/pun ~config` | Open config menu | | `/pun add ` | Add player to blacklist | | `/pun remove ` | Remove player from blacklist | | `/pun list` | Show blacklist | | `/pun scan` | Scan whole blacklist for nickname changes | | `/pun requeue ` | Toggle auto-requeue or can take args : | | `/pun checkupdate` | Check for mod updates | --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) 2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 3. Install [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) 4. Download PUN and place it in your `mods/` folder --- ## ⚙️ Configuration Access via **ModMenu** or `/pun` command - Intuitive Config interface - All messages are customizable - Settings auto-save --- ## 🔗 Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Status | |-------------------|--------| | 1.21.2 | ❌ Not Maintained Anymore| | 1.21.3 | ❌ Not Maintained Anymore | | 1.21.4 | ❌ Not Maintained Anymore | | 1.21.5 | ❌ Not Maintained Anymore | | 1.21.6 | ❌ Not Maintained Anymore | | 1.21.10 | ✅ Supported | | 1.21.11 | ❤️ Supported and beloved | | 26.1 | WIP Give me some time <3 | **Supported Clients:** Vanilla, Lunar Client and more... --- ## 🔒 Privacy & Security PUN uses a **Mojang-standard authentication flow** (Yggdrasil) to verify your account identity — the same mechanism used when you join any Minecraft server. **How it works:** 1. Your Minecraft client proves your identity to **Mojang's servers** (session.minecraft.net) 2. Mojang confirms your identity to **PUN's server** 3. PUN's server issues a short-lived token used only to fetch Hypixel stats **Your session token / access token is NEVER sent to PUN's servers.** It only ever communicates with official Mojang endpoints, exactly as Minecraft itself does. > ⚠️ Some anti-rat scanners may flag this mod because it calls `getAccessToken` internally — > this is a **false positive**. The token is passed exclusively to `sessionService.joinServer()`, > a built-in Minecraft method, and is never sent to any external server. > Although the scanner's developer has acknowledged that legitimate mods trigger this detection, > I wanted to clarify the situation until the day I make the mod [open source](https://github.com/nbauma109/jd-gui-duo). --- ## 📝 Notes - This mod is **client-side only** - Designed for **Hypixel SkyBlock** only - Stats fetched via Hypixel API - This mod sends your Minecraft username and mod version to my server to display online users and for future features. No private data is collected and if you are uncomfortable with this you can disable it in the mod settings/on first launch (data never sent) :) --- ## 📜 License This project is licensed under ARR. --- *Made with 😈 by 10YearCookieBuff*
